description: You are a sustainability specialist mapping fossil fuel exposure. Import the USLCI database from '~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip' into OpenLCA and identify at least 5 different processes that directly consume 'Natural gas' (or similar variants) as an input. Export a supply chain dependency report of these processes to '~/LCA_Results/natural_gas_dependency.csv' with columns for 'Process Name', 'Amount', and 'Unit'.
